summary: An 8-second vertical clip of President Trump climbing the Air Force One stairs, pausing to wave, and entering the plane, with a plain 'President Trump Departs For China' text card. Although it has no dialogue and likely a background music bed, it is a single continuous shot of a real departure event with no cinematic styling, fast-cutting or genre treatment, so it reads as a lightly-edited event clip rather than a produced spectacle.
notable_text: On-screen title card: 'President Trump Departs For China'
